title: Add tsk promote and tsk localize
description: Implement tsk promote <id> (move from project-local/ to project/) and tsk localize <id> (move from project/ to project-local/). Preserve issue ID and update index.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Promote/localize implemented in python/src/taskulus/issue_transfer.py and rust/src/issue_transfer.rs with CLI wiring. Verified by features/issues/local_issue_routing.feature (promote/localize scenarios) in behave and cucumber.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: promote/localize move issue files between project/ and project-local/; IDs preserved; index updates; errors are clear when source not found.
